data.title: FDA Approves Argenx's Vyvgart Hytrulo Prefilled Syringe For Self-Injection For At Home Use Setting
data.description: FDA approves Argenx's Vyvgart Hytrulo prefilled syringe for self-injection in gMG and CIDP, offering flexible dosing and expanding treatment options.

data.title: 12 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Moving In Friday's After-Market Session
Tariffs May Have Mixed Effects On Carmax, May Boost Used Car Demand Due To Pricier New Cars: Analyst
data.description: CarMax Inc (NYSE:KMX) posted a 5.1% rise in same-store used vehicle sales in Q4, signaling a rebound from prior softness. Despite macroeconomic uncertainty, the company reaffirmed its long-term goals while enhancing omnichannel efforts and improving SG&A efficiency.

data.title: Stocks Notch Best Week In Years As Dip Buying On Tariff Crisis Gathers Momentum
data.description: Wall Street ended the week on a strong note, with major indices posting their best weekly performance in years, as traders appeared confident that the escalation in the U.S.-China trade war — which led to triple-digit tariff increases on both sides — would be resolved in the near term.

data.title: Americans Should Cut Spending 'To The Bone' Amid Trump Tariffs, Says Personal Finance Expert
data.description: Trump's tariff plan has caused high market volatility and concerns about U.S. economy in 2025. Expert urges caution and proactive measures for potential hardships.
